user.title: Zone Setup
user.description: Configure a new irrigation zone. Each zone maps to one valve and one set of crops.

data_description.zone_name: A descriptive name, e.g. "Vegetable Bed" or "Tomatoes East".
data_description.valve_entity: The switch entity that controls this zone's water valve.
data_description.watering_time: Time of day to run the daily calculation and open the valve if needed.

zone_params.title: Crops & System
zone_params.description: Describe what is growing in this zone and the physical characteristics of your drip system.

data_description.crops: Select all crops currently growing. Kc is averaged across them.
data_description.planting_date: Date the crops were planted or transplanted. Used to determine growth stage.
data_description.zone_area: Total area covered by this zone's drip emitters.
data_description.flow_rate: Total water output of all emitters in this zone combined.
data_description.max_bucket: Maximum water the soil can hold (field capacity). Typical: 20–40 mm for a 30 cm vegetable bed.
data_description.low_threshold: Open the valve when soil water drops below this level. Typical: 50% of max capacity.

error.threshold_above_max: Watering threshold must be less than the maximum soil capacity.
Watering threshold must be less than the maximum soil capacity.
